summary: Executed backend pytest API regression suite and frontend Playwright integration flow for home/workspace, DAG validation, code export, run execution, and desktop artifact presence checks.
action_items: Make desktop PyInstaller spec project root dynamic (currently hardcoded to '/app') for non-container packaging portability.
critical_code_review_comments: desktop/pyinstaller/ml_forge.spec uses hardcoded project_root = Path('/app'), which will break packaging outside this container path.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data created; tests used fixture payloads only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests run through REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=/api via frontend origin http://127.0.0.1:3000. All requested flows passed. Keep validating WebSocket stream after any engine/parser changes.
rca of the issue: Packaging portability risk root cause: absolute path assumption in desktop PyInstaller spec. Reproduction: build on any machine where source is not mounted at /app; datas and entry script resolution will fail. Mitigation: derive project_root from spec file location (Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2]) or inject via build script env.
